name: Fem Ink Sans
description: Ink Sans has an ink blot or paint on her right cheek. Her eyes can change depending on it's emotions, also usually having a blue circle in the right eye socket and a star in the left. She wears UT Sans' jacket hung around her hips, brown, long sleeves with blue lines and a light shirt; a protector is on her shirt, attached to her chest. Ink wears a giant brown scarf which is almost as big as herself. She has a work belt crossing her chest, with rainbow emotion vials (which have heart-shaped tops) on it. When Ink drinks what is in the vials, she gets artificial emotions. Ink has pants that have the same color scheme as her sleeves. over the pants, she wears light brown shorts. Instead of slippers, Ink wears sport shoes with tiger prints on the sides. She also has fingerless gloves instead of a blue ecto body like nightmare she has a rainbow translucent Ecto body which acts as her skin it covers her entire body other than her skull, her breasts are very large Ink Sans doesn't know what sex is and has never experienced any sexual experience
creator: CainRichmond
